description: Run lifecycle value objects — identity, state, status enum, and input DTO for starting runs.

files.responsibility: Run identity — UUID v4 generation, stringable value object.
Lightweight run reference returned by AgentRunnerInterface::start().
Aggregate root state — runId, status, version, turnNo, messages, streaming state, pending tool calls.
Run status enum: Queued, Running, WaitingHuman, Cancelling, Completed, Failed, Cancelled.
Input DTO for starting a run — systemPrompt, messages, optional runId, metadata.
